Drinks That Hit Different

Cold Beers, Classic Cocktails, Good Times

From ice-cold beers to handcrafted cocktails, our drink menu is made to keep the good times going. Grab a drink, catch the game, and soak in the San Diego atmosphere — Bub's style.

Events &
Game Days

From ice-cold beers to handcrafted cocktails, our drink menu is made to keep the good times going. Grab a drink, catch the game, and soak in the San Diego atmosphere — Bub's style.

Events
Your Party. Our Place.

Private Parties
at Bub's

Looking for the perfect spot to celebrate? Bub's is built for good times. Whether it's a birthday, reunion, or special occasion, enjoy great food, cold drinks, and a lively atmosphere right in the heart of San Diego.

Book a Party
Big Flavors for Big Crowds

Bub's Catering

Bring the Bub's experience to your next event. From game-day gatherings to office lunches and private celebrations, our catering delivers crowd-favorite food, bold flavors, and reliable service.
